landing.title: From idea to app in one conversation
landing.subtitle: Describe your product idea. The AI Agent understands requirements, plans architecture, generates code, and provides an interactive preview.
landing.footer: Atoms Demo - Simplified AI App Builder

examples.idea1: Build a fitness tracking app with workout logging, diet tracking, and weight trends
examples.idea2: Create a project management tool with kanban board and team collaboration
examples.idea3: Build an online learning platform with course management and progress tracking

steps.ideaDesc: Describe the app you want to build in natural language
steps.agentDesc: AI Agent understands requirements and breaks them into tasks
steps.resultDesc: Generate page structure, API, and data models
steps.previewDesc: View an interactive prototype of your app

init.title: Initialize Demo Environment
init.subtitle: Check API connection and verify system readiness. No registration required.
init.noRegistrationDesc: This demo uses anonymous sessions. No accounts, teams, or billing records are created.
init.loadingDesc: Verifying API connection and initialization state...

newApp.title: Describe the app you want to build
newApp.subtitle: Describe your product idea in natural language. The Agent will understand and generate a complete app prototype.
newApp.placeholder: Example: Build a customer success workspace for account status, risk alerts, and renewal tasks
newApp.ideaTooShort: Please provide more detail (at least 5 characters)
newApp.failed: Failed to create app. Please retry.
newApp.aiNotConfigured: Please configure AI model before creating an app

workspace.emptyDesc: No app data found. Please create a new app.
workspace.readyDesc: App created. Click the button to start generation.
workspace.completedDesc: App generation complete. You can view the preview.
workspace.previewHint: Edit a .vue file and click Run to see preview
workspace.followUpPlaceholder: Describe what to adjust next, for example: add permissions, target enterprise users, or add an analytics dashboard...
workspace.followUpHint: Sending will regenerate a complete result from the conversation history
workspace.chatEmpty: No conversation yet. Start creating your app.

steps.plan_product_desc: Generate product goals, user roles and core features
steps.design_pages_desc: Design page structure and component composition
steps.define_api_desc: Generate API draft and data models
steps.finalize_desc: Integrate results and prepare for deployment

previewPage.notGeneratedDesc: Please generate the app in the workspace first.
previewPage.failedDesc: Generation failed. No preview data available.
previewPage.missingResultDesc: App completed but preview data is missing.

servers.title: Server Connections
servers.subtitle: Manage server connections and perform remote operations via Xterm terminal.
servers.emptyDesc: Add a server connection to use the terminal.
servers.name: Name
servers.validation: Please fill in all required fields
servers.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this server?

auth.loginToCreate: Please sign in to create an app
auth.requiredDesc: Creating apps, saving servers, and opening terminals require sign-in.
auth.requiredCreateApp: Sign in before creating an app.
auth.requiredGenerate: Sign in before triggering Agent generation.
auth.requiredServer: Sign in before saving server connections.
auth.requiredTerminal: Sign in before opening the SSH terminal.
auth.callbackFailedDesc: The sign-in state or callback parameters are invalid. Please sign in again.
auth.noTokenExposure: OAuth tokens and session tokens are never exposed to the frontend.

app.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this app?

notes.title: Notes
notes.selectOrCreate: Select a note or create a new one
notes.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this note?

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure AI model API to enable AI generation
settings.apiKeyHelp: API Key is not exposed to the frontend
settings.modelHelp: Leave empty to use default model
settings.baseUrlHelp: Leave empty to use default URL
settings.mockDesc: Uses built-in Mock data generation. No API Key required.
settings.info1: After configuring AI, creating an app will call the AI to generate product spec, page structure, API, data models, and preview.
settings.info2: Supports GPT and MIMO AI models, choose as needed.
settings.info3: If AI is not configured, built-in Mock data generation will be used.
